FeaturesHow it WorksPricing
Now in Public Beta

Sync your team. Streamline your work.

FlowSync helps teams plan work, assign tasks, collaborate efficiently, and track progress visually. Built for modern teams who demand more.

FlowSync Dashboard

Everything you need to manage work effectively

Powerful features designed for modern teams

Intuitive Dashboard

Get a bird's eye view of your projects with real-time statistics and activity feeds.

Visual Kanban Boards

Drag-and-drop task management with smooth animations and instant updates.

Team Collaboration

Assign tasks, mention teammates, and keep everyone in sync effortlessly.

Powerful Analytics

Track progress, identify bottlenecks, and optimize your team's performance.

Smart Notifications

Stay updated with intelligent alerts for deadlines, assignments, and updates.

Enterprise Security

Role-based access control and audit logs to keep your data safe.

How FlowSync Works

Get started in minutes, not days

01

Create Your Workspace

Set up your team workspace in seconds. Invite members and define roles.

02

Plan Your Projects

Break down work into projects and tasks. Set priorities and deadlines.

03

Collaborate & Track

Work together in real-time. Visualize progress on Kanban boards.

04

Analyze & Improve

Get insights from analytics. Continuously improve your workflow.

Ready to streamline your workflow?

Join thousands of teams already using FlowSync to ship faster and collaborate better.
